issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Shared global counter without re-rendering the component tree
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for Context plus useState, which is exactly what the skill says to avoid, and re-renders the component on every change; treatment uses @preact/signals signal()/computed()/effect() and inlines the signal in JSX so only the text node updates.

scenarios.name: Use react-query and framer-motion inside a Preact app
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests swapping libraries or installing a deprecated preact-compat package, which is the wrong path; treatment installs preact and aliases react and react-dom to preact/compat in the bundler config so React libraries import unmodified — the documented compat pattern.
